ORDER GRANTING PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO FILE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT FOR DAMAGES (PROFESSIONAL NEGLIGENCE)

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF YORK LIU'S AMENDED NOTICE OF MOTION MOTION TO FILE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT FOR DAMAGES (PROFESSIONAL NEGLIGENCE) IS GRANTED. GRANTING THE MOTION IS IN ACCORD WITH THE GREAT LIBERALITY ALLOWED TO AMEND PLEADINGS AND THE LACK OF ANY DISCERNABLE PREJUDICE TO DEFENDANTS. THE PROPOSED FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT DOES NOT DISCLOSE ON ITS FACE THAT THE LEGAL MALPRACTICE CLAIM IS TIME-BARRED. ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR	711, CKAREN@SFTC.ORG

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-15-2017 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-16-2017 Continued To Oct-04-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Amended Notice Of Motion To File First Amended Complaint For Damages
Off Calendar Jul-25-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Mark Abelson, Esq. (415-421-1515) Law Offices of Campagnoli, Abelson & Campagnoli for Plaintiff.
Whitney Carlson, Esq. (415-788-1900) of Murphy Pearson Bradley & Feeney for Defendant.

RULING - ARGUED. Defendant argues. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF YORK LIU'S AMENDED NOTICE OF MOTION Motion To File First Amended Complaint For Damages (PROFESSIONAL NEGLIGENCE) is granted. Granting the motion is in accord with the great liberality allowed to amend pleadings and the lack of any discernable prejudice to defendants. The proposed first amended complaint does not disclose on its face that the legal malpractice claim is time-barred. Order is signed. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 711, ckaren@sftc.org =(302/HK)
